subcategory: Progressive carousel with auto-advance and progress tracking
use_cases: Auto-advancing content showcases for feature presentations
Sequential information display with visual progress indicators
Interactive testimonial or testimonial-style content carousels
Product highlight rotations with configurable timing
Progress-driven slide decks for onboarding or presentations
ai_summary: A React-based progressive carousel component using motion/react for smooth animations and React Context for shared state management. Features auto-advancing slides with configurable duration, progress bar tracking, fast-forward capability, and optional vertical orientation. Designed for showcasing sequential content like features, testimonials, or promotional material with visual progress feedback.
